sql.if: AND ( ARCHIVE_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ARCHIVE_DESC LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FILE_ARCHIVE ( ARCHIVE_ID, ARCHIVE_TITLE, ARCHIVE_DESC, FILE_UUID, FILE_NAME, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, UPLOADER_ID, UPLOAD_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_ARCHIVE.NEXTVAL, -- 오라클 시퀀스 가정 #{archiveTitle}, #{archiveDesc}, #{fileUuid}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{uploaderId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT ARCHIVE_ID AS "archiveId", ARCHIVE_TITLE AS "archiveTitle", ARCHIVE_DESC AS "archiveDesc", FILE_UUID AS "fileUuid", FILE_NAME AS "fileName", FILE_PATH AS "filePath", FILE_SIZE AS "fileSize", UPLOAD_DATE AS "createdAt", -- HTML과 맞추기 위해 Alias 변경 UPLOADER_ID AS "uploaderId" FROM FILE_ARCHIVE WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY ARCHIVE_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{recordSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT ARCHIVE_ID AS "archiveId", ARCHIVE_TITLE AS "archiveTitle", ARCHIVE_DESC AS "archiveDesc", FILE_UUID AS "fileUuid", FILE_NAME AS "fileName", FILE_PATH AS "filePath", FILE_SIZE AS "fileSize", UPLOAD_DATE AS "createdAt", UPLOADER_ID AS "uploaderId" FROM FILE_ARCHIVE WHERE ARCHIVE_ID = #{archiveId}
